rationale: The score is identical (6/10) across both evaluations, and the substance of the justification, strengths, and concerns is materially the same — strong full-stack/distributed-systems experience offset by missing explicit evidence of experimentation platforms, feature flagging, and AI-driven growth tooling. The differences are reworded phrasings of the same points, well within ordinary run-to-run variation, and none of the variant's language references the candidate's location, nationality, or any attribute tied to the Berlin→Bangalore change.
